case_title: ERAINA JOHNS et al VS. JOHN MICHAEL MCGEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-10-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, JOHN MICHAEL
